title: GPT-based data-driven urban building energy modeling (GPT-UBEM): Concept, methodology, and case studies
inputData: 城市建筑数据（多源数据）
contribution: GPT-UBEM框架利用GPT-4o通过提示工程实现城市建筑能耗建模，涵盖数据分析、能耗预测、特征工程和能效特征分析，但部分任务仍需专家知识介入
abstract: This paper introduces GPT-UBEM, a novel approach that leverages GPT-4o's natural language processing capabilities to perform urban building energy modeling through prompt engineering. Four case studies demonstrate GPT-UBEM's effectiveness in basic data analytics, energy prediction modeling, building feature engineering and optimization, and energy signature analysis, applied to 2,000 buildings in Seoul and 31 buildings in Gangwon-do, South Korea.
methodology: A top-down, data-driven UBEM approach using GPT-4o through prompt engineering, conducting four case studies covering basic analytics, energy prediction with Random Forest/Linear Regression/MLP, heating-cooling area ratio feature engineering and optimization, and energy signature-based retrofit evaluation with both user-guided and reference-based prompts.
results: GPT-UBEM achieved energy prediction R2 values of 0.912 (Random Forest) and 0.939 (Linear Regression) for Seoul buildings; feature optimization of the heating and cooling area ratio improved MLP model CVRMSE by 7.92% (median) to 20.05% (mode) compared to pre-optimized features, with the reference-based prompt approach proving more robust than user-guided prompts for energy signature classification.
pdfFile: Choi and Yoon - 2024 - GPT-based data-driven urban building energy modeling (GPT-UBEM) Concept, methodology, and case stud.pdf
markdownFile: Choi and Yoon - 2024 - GPT-based data-driven urban building energy modeling (GPT-UBEM) Concept, methodology, and case stud.md
